reviews.review_description: Find the control  really bad..  I have a GO.

developer_response.body:
Hey Stu! 

We have updated controls. Give it a try and let us know if you like them better. We hope you can join us at one of our events. What else can we do for you to get a 5 star review? Please email any suggestions to me at admin@artgatevr.com 

Best,
Brendon

reviews.review_description: Can't even get past the reception room.  I can navigate to "public". I can't even navigate at all. Uninstalled immediately.

developer_response.body:
Hey,

Sorry you had a problems getting around, you need to use the touch pad and trigger on your controller to move around. Not sure what headset you're using but if you send us an email to admin@artgatevr.com we'll gladly walk you through the process of getting it working. We'd love to make sure no one else has the same problem you had!

reviews.review_description:
This is a review by one of the artists in this VR gallery. (Mr. B's Exhibit, come on by if you have a moment) I am a former commercial illustrator and current technology integration specialist. My job is to help professionals integrate the newest technology into their workflow. OK, that said, I am no tech newbie.  As an artist., this idea seemed absolutely brilliant! I wanted to try it!
So I subscribed at the consultant level (with an eye on gallery)
A VR Exhibit of my artwork? No brainer!
Upon paying for my space, lowest level $10.00 per month. I immediately received an email from Brendon McNaughton welcoming me to the service and letting me know that he was always there for me to answer any questions or needed help getting my first exhibition set up.
Wow!
Let's upload some artwork and get an exhibit going!
Oops...cannot get my art files to upload...
Brendon??
I need help! Are you there? I am a tech guy?
Within moments Brendon answered my desperate email with a solution that worked. Started uploading art! Yay! But...wait..
When I try to create a new exhibit, I am only able to add one image and even so, could not create the exhibit, as the create exhibit button did not appear. I only know that because Brendon sent a link to a youtube video that showed the complete process of uploading and exhibiting...but I don't see what is being depicted on my end.
Brendon....help! I don't see the create exhibit button!
No worries...Brendon and Justin fixed it all, and in no time at all  I was up and running with my own gallery room! Amazing!
Artwork uploaded and exhibit completed! I am amazingly impressed with this program and the developers.
Artists who wish to exhibit, take note!
The devs are very responsive...Way to go Brendon and Justin!

ps In case you have not yet discerned, I am incredibly impressed with this app and the developers.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words we're glad you're enjoying the experience!

reviews.review_description: I really like the idea of having a this, but this app is to uncomfortable. Please, just change walking to teleportation controls

developer_response.body: Hey Thanks so much for trying Art Gate, we actually have a setting in the menu to change the movement to Teleport. Hopefully this makes your experience more comfortable :D

reviews.review_title: This is the future of the artmarket inVR
reviews.review_description:
This is the most advanced marketplace for collectors to acquire Post-War & Contemporary Art in virtual reality. Room per room, this innovative application is building the future of the Fine Art Scene. 
- It's easy to open/manage an art gallery
- The interface to upload artworks is intuitive (it looks like Artsy, Artnet/etc) 
- Art Collector: you can inquire for an artwork / or buy it directly
- Art Dealer: you receive email notifications and connect easily with clients
- The support team is gold
All is great! But I have just one problem: I can't move and do any movements on exhibitions in this app :(

developer_response.body:
Hey Neuronnick! 

Thanks for trying Art Gate! We just released an update that should make movement easier. To move forward pull the trigger on your controller, to move backwards click on the track pad. You can also use teleport if you prefer. To do this click the back button when in Art Gate to open the menu and then switch from Locomotion to Teleport. Maybe we should add a quick tutorial! Thanks very much for your feedback. If you have any idea or suggestions for how we can make things better please email us at admin@artgatevr.com :) 

Best,
Brendon McNaughton
Co-Founder
Art Gate VR

reviews.review_description:
The Gallery is great, the art and sculptures looks amazing; there is a high level of quality on display. 
Shadows and textures are amazing in the gallery space. There is a good level of realism which you don't get alot of within the Go Store. 

If your an artist or a general Oculus User this is a must for a free app experience. It's a step into the future of how we look and understand artworks.

This is an amazing team working really hard on making an amazing project unlike no other. They are working on improving this experience and I have spoken to them also. They continue to be polite and helpful.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback and look forward to seeing your exhibition!

reviews.review_description: Great idea if you don't have time to visit real museums but you'd still want to feed your cultural soul.

Art Gate is well curated social space for artists and patrons interested in the art world applications of VR. I've attended a couple of social events in the gallery and members of the team are very engaging and seem genuinely interested in creating a VR art community. Great experience!
I have yet to get the app to load, or even actually work. It continues to say that it's updating. But, it doesn't do anything except say that it is not installed, and it won't even open!

developer_response.body:
Hey Alana! 

Sorry to hear your frustrations. I added you as a friend on Oculus. If you see me online (b_mcnaughton) give me a call and I can talk you through downloading. I have had similar problems with many apps and I can assure you this is an Oculus software problem and not specific to our app. You can also email me at admin@artgatevr.com to set a time for me to help you out. We are here for you and happy to help. 

I look forward to seeing you at some of our gallery openings. It would be greatly appreciated if you update your review once you see how awesome our VR world is. :) 

Kind Regards,
Brendon

reviews.review_description:
Easy to use. 
Even for rank beginner!


Tour guide did great job.

developer_response.body:
Thanks Bob! Great exploring the collections with you. 

Best, 
Brendon

reviews.review_description:
very good app.
Also very friendly and helpful if you have any questions.
Have created a space of my own and works perfectly.
Worth 5 stars

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your kind word Ritchie! It has been incredible to see your collection of artworks from Belgium in the exhibition you created and to connect you with some of the collectors and art world people from North America. Looking forward to your opening reception! 

Best,
Brendon McNaughton

reviews.review_title: The future of the art market
reviews.review_description: Art Gate provided me with an easy way to manage an art gallery in virtual reality. They made VR simple and accessible. Their platform opened my exhibitions to the international stage.

developer_response.body: Thank you for all your support, we're excited to create a virtual reality art world with people like you!

reviews.review_title: The Future of Art Exhibitions...is here.
reviews.review_description:
I was hooked the moment I was able to discuss an art exhibition in real-time with people from other countries. Art Gate's world allows the art to be the focal point and showcases museum-grade exhibitions. 

I can say without a doubt, the experience will only get better and I understand the team's ambitions are grand...I highly suggest you download it and take your time to explore each exhibition.
